name: Subtick Inputs API
description: API for devs who want subtick input handling.

api-disabled.name: Disable Subtick Inputs (Master Switch)
api-disabled.description: Disables all subtick input features globally. Any dependent mods should (hopefully) revert to vanilla behavior.

debug-mode.name: Debug Mode
debug-mode.description: Enables logging for debugging purposes. Does not alter any functionality.

issues.info: Report bugs on the github issue page.
